title: cyrtandra jonesii
intro: Cyrtandra jonesii, also known as Jones' Cyrtandra, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, native to the island of Guam in the Pacific Ocean. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and rheumatism. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help reduce pain and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Cyrtandra jonesii are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
